name: Tech News Sentiment and Sector Analysis
description: Search for latest tech news headlines, classify them by sentiment and sector, and save as structured JSON

tasks.name: Search for latest tech news headlines
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search with query 'latest tech news headlines April 2026'. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim (URLs, titles, snippets). Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' — downstream tasks need the actual data. Include at least 5 distinct headlines with their sources. Output format: List each result with its title, URL, and snippet text.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains at least 5 search results with complete details including URLs, titles, and text snippets from the web search

tasks.name: Classify headlines by sentiment and sector
tasks.description: Extract exactly 5 tech news headlines from task_001's search results. For each headline, classify: (1) sentiment as exactly one of: positive, negative, neutral; (2) sector as exactly one of: AI, hardware, software, crypto, other. Do NOT invent headlines — use only those from task_001's output. Cite task_001 as your source. Output format: JSON array of objects with structure [{"headline": "exact headline text", "url": "source URL from task_001", "sentiment": "positive|negative|neutral", "sector": "AI|hardware|software|crypto|other"}, ...]. Ensure valid JSON syntax.
tasks.success_criteria: Output is valid JSON array with exactly 5 objects, each containing headline (string), url (string starting with https://), sentiment (one of: positive/negative/neutral), and sector (one of: AI/hardware/software/crypto/other)

tasks.name: Write analysis to JSON file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the JSON array from task_002 to a file named 'tech_news_analysis.json'. Use the EXACT JSON content from task_002 without modification. The file_path parameter should be 'tech_news_analysis.json' and content parameter should be the complete JSON array from task_002.
tasks.success_criteria: file_write tool called successfully and creates tech_news_analysis.json containing the valid JSON array from task_002
